status: local gate for public visibility text
gate_rows: If the text mentions a live GitHub route, recheck the route before writing the claim.
If the text mentions a reply, call it a reply or acknowledgement only.
If the text mentions a public comment, call it one comment only.
If the text mentions open source work, do not imply merge, acceptance, review completion, or maintainer approval.
If the text mentions medical AI evaluation, keep it at safety evaluation or claim hygiene level.
If the text invites review, ask for one concrete objection or one weak sentence.
allowed_wording: A reviewer can point to one weak sentence.
